findings.evidence: `BlockedRectangle.lean:60 theorem false_of_source_eq_target (R : GridRectangleBetween x x) : False`; `Rectangle.lean:259 structure GridRectangleBetween {n : ℕ} (x y : GridState n)` with `map_left : y left = x right` and `left_ne_right : left ≠ right`.
findings.fix: Prove `theorem source_ne_target (R : GridRectangleBetween x y) : x ≠ y` first, then derive the self-empty lemmas from it.
findings.issue: `false_of_source_eq_target` only proves the self-special case `GridRectangleBetween x x → False`; any `R : GridRectangleBetween x y` already forces `x ≠ y`.

findings.evidence: `BlockedRectangle.lean:159 theorem not_mem_interior_source_of_mem_fullyBlockedRectangles`; existing general versions are `Rectangle.lean:334 theorem not_mem_interior_of_isEmpty`, `Rectangle.lean:384 theorem not_mem_interior_target_of_isEmpty`, `Rectangle.lean:397 theorem disjoint_interior_OSet_of_avoidsMarkings`, and `Rectangle.lean:402 theorem disjoint_interior_XSet_of_avoidsMarkings`.
findings.fix: Delete these specialized wrappers or keep only the extraction lemmas `isEmpty_of_mem_fullyBlockedRectangles` and `avoidsMarkings_of_mem_fullyBlockedRectangles`; downstream can compose with the existing general lemmas.
findings.issue: The four lemmas at lines 159, 165, 171, and 178 assume membership in `G.fullyBlockedRectangles x y`, but their conclusions only need `R.IsEmpty` or `R.AvoidsMarkings G`, duplicating nearby general theorems with stronger hypotheses.

summary: The rectangle-counting definitions are at the intended roadmap level, but two supporting API pieces are under-generalized or duplicate existing general lemmas with stronger hypotheses.
